title: Like Father, Like Son: Parth Pawar’s 'Pink Jacket' Oath Look Goes Viral, Evokes Memories of Ajit Dada
description: NCP leader Parth Pawar, the son of late Deputy Chief Minister of Maharashtra Ajit Pawar, gave an emotional nod to his father while taking oath as a member of the Rajya Sabha. His look has gone viral on social media, evoking memories of Ajit Dada, who passed away in a fatal crash in Baramati.
